parameters.query: SELECT l.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages WHERE lead_phone = l.phone) AS msg_count, (SELECT text FROM messages WHERE lead_phone = l.phone AND direction = 'inbound' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_inbound, (SELECT text FROM messages WHERE lead_phone = l.phone AND direction = 'outbound' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_outbound FROM leads l WHERE phone = '{{ $('Parse callback').first().json.phone }}' LIMIT 1;
UPDATE leads SET mode = 'auto', manual_until = NULL, updated_at = now() WHERE phone = '{{ $('Parse callback').first().json.phone }}' RETURNING phone, whatsapp_name, funnel_stage;
SELECT direction, sender, text, created_at FROM messages WHERE lead_phone = '{{ $('Parse callback').first().json.phone }}' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 15;
UPDATE leads SET mode = 'manual', manual_until = now() + interval '4 hours', updated_at = now() WHERE phone = '{{ $('Parse callback').first().json.phone }}' RETURNING phone, whatsapp_name;

UPDATE leads SET photo_received = true, funnel_stage = 'qualified', mode = 'auto', manual_until = NULL, escalate_reason = NULL, notes = COALESCE(notes, '') || E'\n[Manager approved photo manually at ' || now()::text || ']', updated_at = now() WHERE phone = '{{ $('Parse callback').first().json.phone }}' RETURNING phone, whatsapp_name;

UPDATE leads SET funnel_stage = 'lost', mode = 'auto', manual_until = NULL, notes = COALESCE(notes, '') || E'\n[Manager triggered offer_course at ' || now()::text || ']', updated_at = now() WHERE phone = '{{ $('Parse callback').first().json.phone }}' RETURNING phone, whatsapp_name, source;
INSERT INTO messages (lead_phone, direction, sender, text, processed, processed_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.phone }}', 'outbound', 'anna', $${{ $json.outbound_text }}$$, true, now());

UPDATE leads SET do_not_contact = true, funnel_stage = 'lost', mode = 'manual', manual_until = now() + interval '100 years', escalate_reason = 'Заблокирован менеджером', notes = COALESCE(notes, '') || E'\n[Manager blocked at ' || now()::text || ']', updated_at = now() WHERE phone = '{{ $('Parse callback').first().json.phone }}' RETURNING phone, whatsapp_name;

parameters.jsCode:
const cb = $('Parse callback').first().json;
return [{ json: { replyText: `❓ Неизвестное: ${cb.action}`, popupText: `❓ ${cb.action}`, chatId: cb.chatId, callbackQueryId: cb.callbackQueryId, messageId: cb.messageId, phone: cb.phone, action: cb.action, managerName: cb.managerName, skipEdit: true } }];

parameters.query: INSERT INTO manager_actions (lead_phone, action, performed_by, manager_chat_id, meta) VALUES ('{{ $json.phone || '' }}', '{{ $json.action }}', 'manager', '{{ $json.chatId }}', jsonb_build_object('manager_name', $${{ $json.managerName || '' }}$$, 'popup', $${{ $json.popupText || '' }}$$));

parameters.jsCode:
const cmd = $json;
const text = `🤖 ANNA BOT — КОМАНДЫ
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📊 /stats — общая статистика
   • Всего лидов / по каналам
   • Воронка по этапам
   • Сколько с фото
   • Manual mode / DNC

👥 /leads — последние 10 лидов
   • Имя, телефон, этап
   • Возраст, профессия

📷 /photos — последние 10 фото
   • Vision verdict (ok/reject)
   • appearance / environment

🔍 /lead <phone> — карточка лида
   Пример: /lead wa_79050829494

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎯 КНОПКИ В АЛЕРТАХ:
👤 Карточка — состояние лида
📝 История — последние 15 сообщений
🛡️ Перехватить — manual 4ч
🤖 Вернуть боту — auto mode
✅ Одобрить фото — пропустить vision
🎓 Курс — отправить video course + lost
🚫 Заблокировать — DNC навсегда`;

return [{ json: { chatId: cmd.chatId, text } }];

parameters.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads) AS total_leads,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE phone LIKE 'wa_%') AS wa_leads,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE phone LIKE 'tg_%') AS tg_leads,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE photo_received = true) AS with_photo,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE mode = 'manual' AND manual_until > now()) AS in_manual,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE do_not_contact = true) AS dnc_leads,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE funnel_stage = 'new') AS new_leads,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE funnel_stage = 'pitched') AS pitched,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE funnel_stage = 'qualified') AS qualified,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE funnel_stage = 'ready_to_pay') AS ready_pay,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE funnel_stage = 'paid_event') AS paid_event,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE funnel_stage = 'paid_agency') AS paid_agency,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE funnel_stage = 'lost') AS lost,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages WHERE direction = 'inbound' AND created_at > now() - interval '24 hours') AS inbound_24h,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages WHERE direction = 'outbound' AND created_at > now() - interval '24 hours') AS outbound_24h,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lead_photos) AS total_photos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lead_photos WHERE vision_verdict = 'ok') AS photos_ok,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lead_photos WHERE vision_verdict = 'reject') AS photos_rejected;

SELECT phone, whatsapp_name, name, funnel_stage, mode, do_not_contact, photo_received, age, profession, last_inbound_at, created_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages WHERE lead_phone = leads.phone) AS msg_count FROM leads ORDER BY last_inbound_at DESC NULLS LAST, created_at DESC LIMIT 10;

SELECT lp.id, lp.lead_phone, lp.received_at AS created_at, lp.vision_verdict, lp.vision_analysis, lp.storage_url, l.whatsapp_name, l.name FROM lead_photos lp LEFT JOIN leads l ON l.phone = lp.lead_phone ORDER BY lp.received_at DESC LIMIT 10;

SELECT l.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages WHERE lead_phone = l.phone) AS msg_count, (SELECT text FROM messages WHERE lead_phone = l.phone AND direction = 'inbound' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_inbound, (SELECT text FROM messages WHERE lead_phone = l.phone AND direction = 'outbound' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_outbound FROM leads l WHERE phone = '{{ $json.searchPhone }}' OR phone LIKE '%{{ $json.searchPhone }}%' LIMIT 1;
